Bash(cd "C:\\wamp\\www\\busbuzz" && find . -maxdepth 3 -iname "@types" -path "*node_modules*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules/node_modules; echo ---; find / -maxdepth 6 -path "*node_modules/@types/react*" -name "package.json" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "/web/" )
Bash(cd "C:\\wamp\\www\\busbuzz\\web" && cat node_modules/react/package.json | grep '"version"'; cat ../node_modules/react/package.json 2>&1 | grep '"version"')
Bash(cat /tmp/nextdev.log 2>&1; echo "---"; ps aux | grep -i next | grep -v grep)

Bash(cd /c/wamp/www/busbuzz/mobile && cat package.json | grep -A5 '"scripts"' && echo "---" && ls src/apps/driver/ && echo "---jest---" && find . -maxdepth 2 -iname "jest*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null && echo "---testdir---" && find . -iname "__tests__" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" 2>/dev/null)
Bash(cd /c/wamp/www/busbuzz/shared && find . -iname "__tests__" -o -iname "jest.config*" 2>/dev/null | grep -v node_modules; cat package.json 2>/dev/null | head -30)

Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const needed = ['build:parent:apk','build:driver:apk','build:parent:prod','build:driver:prod','start:parent','start:driver']; needed.forEach\(s => console.log\(s + ':', p.scripts[s] ? 'FOUND' : 'MISSING'\)\);")
Bash(printf '%s\\n' '# Review: Web Admin Dashboard + Landing Page Visual Rebuild \(Bento Grid Design System\)')
Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'Walking the Definition of Done checklist against the actual diff.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' '- Hero headline DM Serif Display 80px desktop / 48px mobile with italic amber line 2: PASS. web/app/page.tsx line 64 uses font-display text-[48px] md:text-[80px] with the italic text-amber span on line 2.')
Bash(printf '%s\\n' '- HeroVisual mini-dashboard \(3 stat cards + Mapbox dark mini-map, Lagos, amber dots\): PASS. HeroVisual.tsx implements this with correct token guard pattern.')
Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'No security findings. This is a visual-only rebuild with no new Edge Functions, no new DB tables, and no RLS policy changes.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'All new client-side Supabase queries \(BentoLiveMap, LiveStatusWidget, dashboard home page\) use the user-scoped createClient \(anon key + active user session\), not a service-role client. Data access is gated by existing RLS policies.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'The middleware auth gate: web/middleware.ts shows matcher: ["/dashboard/:path*"], which is correct. The tester found it had been set to /__TEMP_DISABLED_FOR_VERIFY__/:path* \(leftover from a prior verification session\) and fixed it before the verification run concluded. Confirmed: unauthenticated requests to /dashboard/settings receive a 307 redirect to /login.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'The middleware disabled-matcher regression was found during verification and is now restored. No other disabled auth gates, hardcoded test values, or commented-out auth checks appear in any file touched by this diff. All route protection and auth gates examined are intact.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'shared/types.ts and shared/schemas.ts are marked modified in git status despite this spec declaring no shared file changes. Code inspection confirms these are additive-only additions from prior pipeline runs \(new interfaces TripStopTrigger, DriverPin, OnboardSchoolResponse, DriverLoginResponse and corresponding Zod schemas for driver PIN auth and reports\). No existing interface or schema was altered. No regression risk to other features.')

Bash(printf '%s\\n' 'web/components/dashboard/BentoLiveMap.tsx: the map-init useEffect \(line 127\) lacks the mapRef.current double-init guard present in HeroVisual.tsx \(line 38\), which the spec cited as the reference model. In React StrictMode during development, effects fire twice, which can momentarily create two Mapbox GL instances before the first cleanup. Production builds are unaffected. Worth aligning with HeroVisual in a follow-up.')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem Cert:\\LocalMachine\\Root, Cert:\\CurrentUser\\Root | Where-Object { $_.Subject -match 'netskope|zscaler|forcepoint|bluecoat|mcafee|broadcom|palo ?alto|cisco|umbrella|inspect|proxy' } | Select-Object Subject, Thumbprint, NotAfter | Format-List)

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -Verb RunAs -ArgumentList '-NoProfile -Command "New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName ''Expo Metro Bundler \(BusBuzz dev\)'' -Direction Inbound -Program ''C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe'' -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8081 -Action Allow -Profile Any -Enabled True; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3"' -Wait)
PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; if \(Test-Path "$env:TEMP\\busbuzz-preview.apk"\) { \(Get-Item "$env:TEMP\\busbuzz-preview.apk"\).Length } else { "file not found yet" })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $conns | Select-Object LocalPort, OwningProcess; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, ProcessName, Path } })

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8081 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; "done")

Bash(xargs sed -i -e 's/font-display text-\\[26px\\]/font-heading font-bold text-[24px] tracking-tight/g' -e 's/font-display text-\\[20px\\]/font-heading font-bold text-[18px] tracking-tight/g' -e 's/font-display text-\\[18px\\]/font-heading font-bold text-[16px] tracking-tight/g' -e 's/font-display text-xl/font-heading font-bold text-[18px] tracking-tight/g')
Bash(sed -i "s/Live School Bus Tracking for Lagos Private Schools/Live School Bus Tracking for Private Schools/" app/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i "s/Real-time GPS tracking for school buses in Lagos\\./Real-time GPS tracking for school buses across Nigeria./" app/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i "s/Most replacements are delivered within 48 hours in Lagos\\./Most replacements are delivered within 48 hours./" app/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i "s/Every Lagos school morning, a child gets on a bus\\./Every school morning, a child gets on a bus./" app/page.tsx)
Bash(sed -i "s/IKOYI MORNING RUN/MORNING SCHOOL RUN/" app/page.tsx)
